notes: Safe default gaming profile: shut down WSL, close Docker, stop Windows Search indexing, switch to high-performance power plan, and enable Game Mode. VS Code is left running by default; set safety.killVSCode=true in machine.local.json or pass -KillCode to terminate it.
Safe default coding profile: return to balanced power, disable Game Mode, and ensure Windows Search is available.
Balanced mode: neutral daily-use profile. Keep current apps running, return to balanced power, disable Game Mode, and ensure Windows Search is available.
Baseline-oriented diagnose profile for audio stutter testing without extra mode noise. Run doctor after switching to this mode.
Maximum-quiet profile: stops all dev workloads and browsers, shuts down WSL, keeps balanced power. Use for audio recording, video calls, or troubleshooting background noise.

Audio-safe mode: kills all known audio-risk processes (Nahimic conflicts, browser GPU, dev workloads), shuts down WSL and Docker, sets high-performance power to avoid CPU parking. Use when experiencing audio stutter or before running LatencyMon.

Hybrid dev+game profile for playing RimWorld while modding: stops Docker, keeps WSL and VS Code running, raises RimWorld CPU priority to AboveNormal, demotes heavy dev processes. Add your RimWorld.exe path to setGpuPreference in config/machine.local.json to also force the discrete GPU. Listener auto-detect: set listener.gameProfiles with namePattern RimWorld* and onGameStart rimworld-mod in machine.local.json.

Full-performance profile for demanding titles (Elden Ring, Cyberpunk 2077): shuts down WSL and Docker, High Performance power plan, Game Mode enabled, Windows Search stopped. Configure setPriorities and setGpuPreference with your game executables in config/machine.local.json.
Restore the last reversible changes recorded in state/rollback.json.
